title: erysimum flavum subsp. viride
intro: Erysimum flavum subsp. viride, also known as the green wallflower, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates and flavonoids. The health benefits of Erysimum flavum subsp. viride include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential effects on human health.
